TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_bakici, title = bakici, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/bakici} }

S.FORM: == bakici == śįīś°∂ / sapidadum ita ku bakici. siwkay nu bakici u bakici sa, sapilacul tu nanum saca tuutuud. u kamu nu Sakizaya "bakici", namakay Amilika a kamu "bucket". matenes misaungay nu tademaw. anu miculu' ku canacanan ,bakici sa u kapahay a sakaluk. itawya i niyazu', inayi' henay ku cilaisui , sapidadum ku nayazu'ay. tinaku a kamu sibakici Śł∂śįīś°∂ / sibakici kaku midadum. sibakiciay Śł∂śįīś°∂ÁöĄ / ciniza dada' ku sibakiciay. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika A bucket or pail is typically a watertight, vertical cylinder or truncated cone, with an open top and a flat bottom, attached to a semicircular carrying handle called the bail.
S.PHON: == baki ¶i == ** / sapidadum ita ku baki ¶i. siwkaj nu baki ¶i u baki ¶i sa, sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu nanum sa ¶a tuutuud. u kamu nu sakizaja "baki ¶i", namakaj amir~…ĺika a kamu "bu ¶k…ôt". mat…ôn…ôs misauŇčaj nu tad…ômaw. anu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku ¶ana ¶anan ,baki ¶i sa u kapańßaj a sakar~…ĺuk. itawja i nijazu Ē~ °, inaji Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku ¶ir~…ĺaisui , sapidadum ku najazu Ē~ °aj. tinaku a kamu sibaki ¶i *** / sibaki ¶i kaku midadum. sibaki ¶iaj **** / ¶iniza dada Ē~ ° ku sibaki ¶iaj. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika a bu ¶k…ôt or pair~…ĺ is tjpi ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj a wat…ôrtigńßt, *…ôrti ¶ar~…ĺ ¶jr~…ĺind…ôr or trun ¶at…ôd ¶on…ô, witńß an op…ôn top and a fr~…ĺat bottom, atta ¶ńß…ôd to a s…ômi ¶ir ¶ur~…ĺar ¶arrjiŇč ńßandr~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd tńß…ô bair~…ĺ.
S.FORM: == bakici == śįīś°∂ / sapidadum ita ku bakici. siwkay nu bakici u bakici sa, sapilacul tu nanum saca tuutuud. u kamu nu Sakizaya "bakici", namakay Amilika a kamu "bucket". matenes misaungay nu tademaw. anu miculu' ku canacanan ,bakici sa u kapahay a sakaluk. itawya i niyazu', inayi' henay ku cilaisui , sapidadum ku nayazu'ay. tinaku a kamu sibakici Śł∂śįīś°∂ / sibakici kaku midadum. sibakiciay Śł∂śįīś°∂ÁöĄ / ciniza dada' ku sibakiciay. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika A bucket or pail is typically a watertight, vertical cylinder or truncated cone, with an open top and a flat bottom, attached to a semicircular carrying handle called the bail.
S.PHON: == baki ¶i == ** / sapidadum ita ku baki ¶i. siwkaj nu baki ¶i u baki ¶i sa, sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu nanum sa ¶a tuutuud. u kamu nu sakizaja "baki ¶i", namakaj amir~…ĺika a kamu "bu ¶k…ôt". mat…ôn…ôs misauŇčaj nu tad…ômaw. anu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku ¶ana ¶anan ,baki ¶i sa u kapańßaj a sakar~…ĺuk. itawja i nijazu Ē~ °, inaji Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku ¶ir~…ĺaisui , sapidadum ku najazu Ē~ °aj. tinaku a kamu sibaki ¶i *** / sibaki ¶i kaku midadum. sibaki ¶iaj **** / ¶iniza dada Ē~ ° ku sibaki ¶iaj. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika a bu ¶k…ôt or pair~…ĺ is tjpi ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj a wat…ôrtigńßt, *…ôrti ¶ar~…ĺ ¶jr~…ĺind…ôr or trun ¶at…ôd ¶on…ô, witńß an op…ôn top and a fr~…ĺat bottom, atta ¶ńß…ôd to a s…ômi ¶ir ¶ur~…ĺar ¶arrjiŇč ńßandr~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd tńß…ô bair~…ĺ.
